name: tutorial-creator
description: Generate annotated code-reading tutorials from your own codebase — three surfaces (tutorial / vocab / status), writing-to-learn entries, and audience-facing venue templates

plugins.name: tutorial-creator
plugins.description: Generate personalized, annotated code-reading tutorials from your own codebase. Three surfaces (tutorial generation, vocabulary management, learning-state inspection), six writing-to-learn entry points, and five audience-facing entry points. Tracks vocabulary with a status state machine.
